raw_text: {"intent":"Compile durable memory from the provided context table of person preferences.","decision":"Store two preference memories as current and non-conflicting.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preference object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"topic","role":"preference object"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The input provides two distinct people with clear preferences and no ambiguous entity overlap."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Stored preferences for Sam and Daniele.","citations":["Input table: Sam -> Bill Evans","Input table: Daniele -> Knowledge graphs"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Created 2 preference memory cards.","No conflicts or deletions detected."]}}
